title: paullinia integra
intro: Paullinia integra, also known as Gamboge or Chinese Gamboge, is a plant-based resin derived from the sap of the Garcinia hanburyi tree, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The resin is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Paullinia integra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of rheumatism and arthritis, and promote digestion, as well as its potential to support weight loss and improve skin health. In traditional Chinese medicine, Paullinia integra is commonly prepared as a powder or tincture, or used in combination with other herbs in formulas to treat various health conditions.
